**VERDICT: NO_EVENTS_FOUND**

**EVENTS:** *(none)*

**REASON:** Across all qualifying sources checked — including Ticketmaster, Live Nation, SeatGeek, and the official tripleS website (triplescosmos.com) — no publicly announced tripleS concert, tour stop, or fan meeting with a specific date after 2026-07-15 was found.

citations.cited_text: We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for tripleS. Please check back soon.

content.text: Ticketmaster explicitly states: "We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for tripleS. Please check back soon."

citations.cited_text: There are no upcoming events for TripleS. Check back later for new event dates!
citations.title: TripleS Tickets & 2026 Concert Tour Dates

content.text: SeatGeek similarly shows "There are no upcoming events for TripleS. Check back later for new event dates!"
The only 2026 activity found from official/reliable media sources is the **ASSEMBLE26: LOVE&POP** music comeback project —

citations.cited_text: On January 26 at midnight KST, tripleS officially announced their plans for “ASSEMBLE26,” which will consist of two separate comebacks for “LOVE&POP.”...
citations.title: Watch: tripleS Announces 2 Full-Group Comebacks With "ASSEMBLE26 'LOVE&POP'" Teaser | Soompi

content.text: tripleS announced two full-group comebacks for "LOVE&POP," with "LOVE side" promotions in the first half of 2026 and "POP side" promotions in the second half

citations.cited_text: Although no comeback dates have yet been announced, the new teaser promises that “ASSEMBLE 26 ‘LOVE&POP’” is “coming very soon.” Check out the new ann...
citations.title: Watch: tripleS Announces 2 Full-Group Comebacks With "ASSEMBLE26 'LOVE&POP'" Teaser | Soompi

content.text: no comeback dates had yet been announced

, and a music release is not a live event. The Asia tour ("My Secret New Zone") referenced in fan wikis began in February 2026 and no future dated stops after July 15, 2026 were found from any qualifying source.
